items.title: Tailwind CSS Documentation
items.summary: Official documentation for Tailwind CSS, the utility-first CSS framework. Covers installation, core concepts, and all utility classes. The search is excellent — fastest way to find any class or concept.

items.title: How I Built a Second Brain with Obsidian
items.summary: Tiago Forte's overview of the Building a Second Brain methodology — a system for capturing, organizing, and retrieving knowledge using digital tools. Core framework: CODE (Capture, Organize, Distill, Express) and PARA (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives).
